name: Diablo Jalapeno Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Sterilize jelly jars and lids according to manufacturer's instructions.
2. Remove seeds from green pepper and chilies (Handle chiles with care, avoiding contact with eyes). Fit the knife blade into the bowl. Chop green pepper into 1/4-inch pieces. Measure 1/2 cup for use later. Chop jalapenos into 1/4-inch pieces. Measure 1/4 cup.
3. Place the chopped green pepper and jalapenos, sugar, and vinegar in a large saucepan. Bring to a boil. Continue boiling for one minute. Remove from heat and let cool for five minutes. Stir in pectin and food coloring.
4. Strain mixture through a fine strainer to remove pieces of peppers. Pour strained liquid into sterilized jars. Cover tightly and store in a cool place up to 6 months.
5. Makes 2 cups.
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
Serving Ideas: Serve with scrambled eggs and meats.
NOTES: See recipe for "Southwest Scrambled Eggs."
Contributor: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:45
